title: crepis arenaria subsp. suberostris
intro: Crepis arenaria subsp. suberostris, also known as the lesser hawk's-beard, is a plant species that belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Crepis arenaria subsp. suberostris include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as an infusion or tincture, and is sometimes used in herbal remedies to treat various health conditions.
